html:
Exclusive to:

Stuffed Pepper Poppers are a Meat Food Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. They are cooked in a Crock Pot by combining a Pepper and Meats with a total Meat value of 1.5 or below.

Using a Twig as filler will result in Kabobs while adding two Twigs will make Wet Goop. Using extra Meats will result in Meatballs or Meaty Stew, adding Eggs has a chance to result in Pierogi.

When eaten, it will increase the player's temperature by 1 degree per second over 15 seconds.

Recipe

≤1.5

×2

Filler cannot be Inedibles.

Examples

×2

×2

Trivia

  • Stuffed Pepper Poppers were added to Don't Starve Together in Warly's Character Update.
  • Despite Wigfrid's comment showing disgust, Stuffed Pepper Poppers still count as a meat item; as such, she can eat it.
    • Similarly, Wurt comments on the spiciness, despite not being able to eat it.

Gallery

  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord


By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

Using a Twig as filler will result in Kabobs while adding two Twigs will make Wet Goop. Using extra Meats will result in Meatballs or Meaty Stew, adding Eggs has a chance to result in Pierogi.
When eaten, it will increase the player's temperature by 1 degree per second over 15 seconds.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Nhồi Tiêu Poppers là một Món Ăn Thịt độc quyền trong Don't Starve Together. Chúng được nấu trong Nồi Hầm bằng cách kết hợp Tiêu và Thịt với tổng giá trị Thịt là 1,5 hoặc thấp hơn.

'''Stuffed Pepper Poppers''' are a [[Meat]] [[Food]] [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. They are cooked in a [[Crock Pot]] by combining a [[Pepper]] and [[Meats]] with a total Meat value of 1.5 or below.

Using a [[Twigs|Twig]] as filler will result in [[Kabobs]] while adding two Twigs will make [[Wet Goop]]. Using extra Meats will result in [[Meatballs]] or [[Meaty Stew]], adding [[Eggs]] has a chance to result in [[Pierogi]].

When eaten, it will increase the player's temperature by 1 degree per second over 15 seconds.

== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Peppers
|item2 = Meats
|comparator2 = ≤
|count2 = 1.5
|item3 = Filler
|count3 = 2
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Stuffed Pepper Poppers
|note = Filler cannot be [[Inedibles]].
}}

== {{pic|32|Crock Pot}} Examples ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Peppers
|item2 = Meat
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Stuffed Pepper Poppers
|item3 = Ice
|count3 = 2
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Peppers
|item2 = Morsels
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Stuffed Pepper Poppers
|item3 = Berry
|count3 = 2
}}
{{clear}}

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Stuffed Pepper Poppers were added to ''Don't Starve Together'' in [[Warly]]'s [[Don't Starve Together/Version History#July 25, 2019 - Warly Character Update|Character Update]].
*Despite [[Wigfrid]]'s comment showing disgust, Stuffed Pepper Poppers still count as a meat item; as such, she can eat it.
**Similarly, [[Wurt]] comments on the spiciness, despite not being able to eat it.
